title.en: FUNCTIONAL FEATURES OR DETAILS OF LIGHTING DEVICES OR SYSTEMS THEREOF; STRUCTURAL COMBINATIONS OF LIGHTING DEVICES WITH OTHER ARTICLES, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

Frames

Composite shades {, i.e. shades being made of distinct parts}
Covers for frames; Frameless shades
Manufacturing shades

of lens shape

producing an asymmetric light distribution

{providing for indirect lighting}

{with an elongated shape to cooperate with linear light sources}
{adapted to cooperate with light sources of shapes different from point-like or linear, e.g. circular light sources}
{specially adapted to cooperate with point like light sources; specially adapted to cooperate with light sources the shape of which is unspecified (F21V7/16 - F21V7/30 take precedence)}
{for portable lighting devices}

{using total internal reflection}
Optical design
Construction
characterised by materials, surface treatments or coatings, e.g. dichroic reflectors
Elements for modifying spectral properties, polarisation or intensity of the light emitted, e.g. filters (coloured shades F21V1/00; elements characterised by cooling arrangements F21V29/502)
for simulating daylight (F21V9/04, F21V9/06 take precedence)
for filtering out infrared radiation (dichroic reflectors F21V7/22; using liquid-filled chambers F21V9/12)
for filtering out ultraviolet radiation
for producing coloured light, e.g. monochromatic; for reducing intensity of light (with provision for controlling the colour F21V9/40)
for producing polarised light
Dichroic filters, i.e. devices operating on the principle of wave interference to pass specific ranges of wavelengths while cancelling others

Elements containing photoluminescent material distinct from or spaced from the light source (shades F21V1/17; globes, bowls or cover glasses F21V3/08, F21V3/12; refractors F21V5/10; reflectors F21V7/26, F21V7/30; elements with provision for controlling the spectral properties or intensity F21V9/40)
with provision for controlling spectral properties, e.g. colour, or intensity
Screens not covered by groups F21V1/00, F21V3/00, F21V7/00 or F21V9/00 (characterised by cooling arrangements F21V29/502)
using parallel laminae or strips, e.g. of Venetian-blind type (F21V11/06 takes precedence)
using crossed laminae or strips {, e.g. grid-shaped louvers}; using lattices or honeycombs
using diaphragms containing one or more apertures
using sheets without apertures, e.g. fixed

Producing particular characteristics or distribution of the light emitted by means of a combination of elements specified in two or more of main groups F21V1/00 - F21V11/00 (controlling the distribution of the light emitted by adjustment of elements F21V14/00)
Combinations of only two kinds of elements
Combinations of only three kinds of elements

Controlling the distribution of the light emitted by adjustment of elements (reflectors with provision for adjusting the curvature F21V7/16; light filters or the like with provision for controlling the colour or intensity F21V9/40; screens using adjustable parallel laminae or strips F21V11/04; screens using iris-type diaphragms F21V11/10; screens using movable sheets without apertures F21V11/18; adjustable mountings for lighting devices F21V21/14)
{by interposition of elements with electrically controlled variable light transmissivity, e.g. liquid crystal elements or electrochromic devices}
{by means of optical elements, e.g. films, filters or screens, being rolled up around a roller}
by movement of light sources {(in vehicle head lamps F21S41/657)}
by movement of reflectors {(in vehicle head lamps F21S41/675)}
by movement of refractors {(in vehicle head lamps F21S41/635)}
by movement of the screens {or filters}
Protecting lighting devices from damage (protection from thermal damage F21V29/00; gas-tight or water-tight arrangements F21V31/00)
{Measures against vandalism, stealing or tampering (F21V15/02, F21V15/04 take precedence)}
Housings, e.g. material or assembling of housing parts (F21V15/02 takes precedence {housings forming signs or letters G09F13/04})
Cages
Resilient mountings, e.g. shock absorbers  {(shock absorbing devices of vehicle headlamp housings B60Q1/0491; in general F16F15/04)}
Fastening of component parts of lighting devices, e.g. shades, globes, refractors, reflectors, filters, screens, grids or protective cages (of light sources or light holders F21V19/00)
{with provision for interchangeability, i.e. component parts being especially adapted to be replaced by another part with the same or a different function (F21V17/10 takes precedence)}
{with keying means, i.e. for enabling the assembling of component parts in distinctive positions, e.g. for preventing wrong mounting}
{with provision for shipment or storage}
with provision for adjustment (F21V17/04 - F21V17/08 take precedence)
the fastening being onto or by the light source
the fastening being onto or by the lampholder
onto the supporting or suspending arrangements of the lighting device, e.g. power cords, standards
characterised by specific fastening means or way of fastening (F21V17/02 - F21V17/08 take precedence)
Fastening of light sources or lamp holders (fastening electric light source solely by the coupling device H01R33/00 {; special means for attaching candle to candle holder F21V35/003})
{of sources having contact pins, wires or blades, e.g. pinch sealed lamp (F21V19/001 takes precedence)}
{the light sources being semiconductors devices, e.g. LEDs}

{of point-like light sources, e.g. incandescent or halogen lamps, with screw-threaded or bayonet base (of sources having contact pins, wires or blades F21V19/0005; of LEDs or sources mounted on printed-circuit board F21V19/001)}
{of tubular light sources, e.g. ring-shaped fluorescent light sources}
with provision for adjustment, e.g. for focusing
with provision for changing light source, e.g. turret {(auxiliary devices for cleaning, placing, or removing incandescent lamps H01K3/32, fluorescent lamps H01J9/006)}

Fastening incandescent mantles or other incandescent bodies to lamp parts; Suspension devices for incandescent mantles or other incandescent bodies (arrangements of mantles or other incandescent bodies on burners F21V36/00)

Supporting, suspending, or attaching arrangements for lighting devices (F21V17/00, F21V19/00 take precedence; arrangement of signalling or lighting devices, the mounting or supporting thereof or circuits therefor, for vehicles in general B60Q, stands for supporting apparatus or articles in general F16M11/00); Hand grips
making direct electrical contact, e.g. by piercing (F21V21/35 takes precedence)
for several lighting devices in an end-to-end arrangement, i.e. light tracks
Suspending from a cable or suspension line
Wall, ceiling, or floor bases; Fixing pendants or arms to the bases (F21V21/08 takes precedence; bases for movable standing lamps F21V21/06)
Bases for movable standing lamps; Fixing standards to the bases (F21V21/08 takes precedence)
Devices for easy attachment to any desired place, e.g. clip, clamp, magnet
Pendants, arms, or standards; Fixing lighting devices to pendants, arms, or standards (adjustable mounting F21V21/14; construction of posts not peculiar to use with lighting devices E04H12/00)
Spring-loaded poles fixed at both ends
Adjustable mountings
Supporting elements displaceable along a guiding element {(telescopic mounting of lighting devices F21V21/22)}
Hoisting or lowering devices, e.g. for maintenance
Hand grips

{the elements being electrical wires or cables}

the elements being transformers, impedances {or power supply units, e.g. a transformer with a rectifier}
the elements being switches (safety devices F21V25/00)
the elements being coupling devices {, e.g. connectors}
Safety devices structurally associated with lighting devices (gas- tight or water-tight arrangements F21V31/00; in general F16P; protective circuit arrangements per se H02H7/00)
coming into action when lighting device is disturbed, dismounted, or broken
coming into action when lighting device is overloaded, e.g. thermal switch
Flameproof or explosion-proof arrangements

Cable-stowing arrangements structurally associated with lighting devices, e.g. reels  {(storing lengths of cable in general B65H; the lighting devices being vehicle headlamps F21S41/192; the lighting devices being vehicle lights F21S43/195)}
{for portable lighting devices}
Cable inlets

Protecting lighting devices from thermal damage; Cooling or heating arrangements specially adapted for lighting devices or systems (lighting fixtures combined with outlets for air-treatment systems F24F13/078)

Thermal insulation
